title: 현금성 GitHub bounty scout 9건 — GO 없음
channel: GitHub issue + fork PR + bounty/platform payout

evidence.summary: NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Issue open, assignee 없음, PR route exists. Body requires PR description to start with a code block containing the system prompt and contributor_meta.json. Comments show multiple /attempt entries and submitted PR #398 already addressing the exact one-line doc fix. / Algora bot comment shows $1 cash/platform bounty with /attempt and /claim route.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Issue open, assignee 없음. Same UnsafeLabs AI-only template requires system prompt disclosure in PR body; comments/attempts already present from search result context. / Labels show 💎 Bounty and $1; likely Algora cash/platform route.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음. Prerequisite #26 must be merged first; comments show TiagoAlmeidaS, weilixiong, zp6 PR #70, yi-hialong, cycy701 already attempting. Scope requires full Angular upgrade/build/runtime validation. / Comments include /opire try, but issue body does not show price in GitHub view.

NO-GO / OPPORTUNITY_COST — Issue open, assignee 없음. Depends on #27 first; comments show multiple attempts and PR #71. Scope includes multi-pass Angular standalone migration, control-flow migration, builder changes, and full build validation. / Comments include /opire try, but price is not visible in GitHub issue body.

NO-GO / OPPORTUNITY_COST — Issue open, assignee 없음. Depends on #28; comments show multiple attempts and PR #72. Scope includes Ionic major upgrade, CSS migration, component API audits, visual QA. / Comments include /opire try, but visible GitHub issue body has no amount.

NO-GO / PAYMENT_UNCLEAR — Issue open, assignee 없음. Maintainer comment says “It is already being implemented.” Figma UI scope is sizeable desktop tray MVP. / Issue title has 💎 but reward amount and claim/payout route are not visible. Commenters asked for confirmation.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Issue open, assignee 없음, but IssueHunt summary lists submitted PR #2. Comment confirms PR #2 already implements prefixed workspace config files with tests/docs. / IssueHunt badge shows $4 funded and submit-PR-to-claim link.

HOLD / PAYMENT_UNCLEAR — Issue open, assignee 없음. Very old issue; part of Chrome helper filtering already done in 3.5.0. Remaining request is ambiguous smart-mode/product behavior with maintainer design choices; IssueHunt current payout certainty not verified from GitHub alone. / IssueHunt bot/comment shows $40 open bounty historically.

NO-GO / HIGH_USER_INPUT — Issue open, assignee 없음. Bot states issue is not ready for assignment and needs maintainer help-wanted label before /assign works. / Issue points to OWASP BLT-Pool, but this GitHub issue has no price/payment terms.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 9건 검색 및 preflight 확인.
다수 후보가 이미 exact competing PR/attempt로 선점되어 자동 PR 제외.
중복 제출, 참여자격 제한, broad acceptance, 불완전 PR 위험이 실행 차단.

next_action: 다음 bounty scout에서 경쟁 PR 0건, participant eligibility clear, deterministic small diff/test, cash/platform payout visible 후보를 우선 재검색.
